product.name: SoberCraft IPA
product.description: Premium nonalcoholic craft IPA for sober-curious adults and health-conscious beer drinkers.
product.demographic: Sober-curious adults, athletes, and craft beer drinkers

confidence_reasons: thin coverage — relying partly on fallback prior

counterfactuals.description: Money-back guarantee or 30-day free trial reduces trust friction
counterfactuals.label: Add risk-reversal guarantee

counterfactuals.description: Expand from DTC-only to Target/Walmart/grocery presence
counterfactuals.label: Add retail distribution

forecast.headline: Comparable data is thin or unreliable for this product. Pilot before scaling — predicted 17% trial is directional, not validated.
why_might_be_wrong: Forecast leans partly on broader category data because exact-subtype comparables are thin.

agents.profile: Buys 1, tests, then commits or drops.
agents.reason: I'd try this once: the comparable-brand math is reasonable and the price isn't crazy.
agents.top_objection: Need to verify retail pricing matches DTC.

agents.profile: Mobile, social-driven.
agents.reason: Category timing works — buyers are already paying for Poppi Prebiotic Soda-style products.
agents.top_objection: Want a clear cancellation policy upfront.

agents.profile: Buys for team / coworkers.
agents.reason: Differentiation is small but real, and the price gives it room to breathe.
agents.top_objection: Hope the formulation matches the marketing claims.

agents.profile: Tries everything, sends back what doesn't fit.
agents.reason: Solid bet given the comparable-brand anchors. I'd put it in my next order.
agents.top_objection: Want a money-back guarantee for first order.

agents.profile: Was premium, now shopping mid-tier.
agents.reason: The retail/DTC distribution lines up; that's usually what makes or breaks trial.
agents.top_objection: Need to confirm it's compatible with my current routine.

agents.profile: Tracks sleep, supplements, recovery. Reads labels.
agents.reason: Interested but waiting on independent reviews before pulling the trigger.
agents.top_objection: Not sure it's better than what I'm already using.

agents.profile: Compares unit price. Questions DTC premiums.
agents.reason: Comparable to Olipop Prebiotic Soda, but I'd want a clearer differentiation story first.
agents.top_objection: Need more independent reviews before deciding.

agents.profile: Has 4+ active DTC subs. Cancels often.
agents.reason: Price is fine; the question is whether it earns its spot in my routine.
agents.top_objection: Differentiation from Liquid Death Mountain Water isn't yet clear to me.

agents.profile: Trusts what's on Costco / Target shelves.
agents.reason: Could go either way. I'd watch how the first buyer cohort reacts.
agents.top_objection: Want to see longer-term user data first.

agents.profile: Tries new launches within 60 days.
agents.reason: Not against it — just need a reason to switch from what already works.
agents.top_objection: Price-to-value ratio is borderline — could go either way.

agents.profile: Stacks 3+ daily supplements.
agents.reason: Decent fit with Olipop Prebiotic Soda-style adoption, but I haven't seen enough of it yet.
agents.top_objection: Would prefer to see it on a retail shelf before committing.

agents.profile: Buys what creators they trust use.
agents.reason: Open to it, but I'd want a sample or money-back guarantee before committing.
agents.top_objection: Need a clearer use-case for my specific situation.

agents.profile: Has the problem, doubts the solution.
agents.reason: Friction outweighs upside; one more thing to manage in my routine.
agents.top_objection: Doesn't solve a problem I have right now.

agents.profile: Currently uses a comparable brand.
agents.reason: Existing alternatives serve me — I'd need a 2x reason, not a 1.1x reason.
agents.top_objection: Reviews aren't strong enough to justify a try.

agents.profile: Pays for fast shipping, hates lock-in.
agents.reason: The category is crowded; I don't have shelf-space (mental or physical) for another.
agents.top_objection: Brand story doesn't differentiate from Olipop Prebiotic Soda.

agents.profile: Reads studies. Knows actives.
agents.reason: I already use Liquid Death Mountain Water; switching cost is real and the upside isn't obvious.
agents.top_objection: Subscription fatigue / no clear reason to switch.

agents.profile: Buys for spouse / family.
agents.reason: Price feels high for what looks like another Athletic Brewing NA Beer variant.
agents.top_objection: Loyal to Athletic Brewing NA Beer; switching cost outweighs benefit.

agents.profile: Lurks niche subreddits before buying.
agents.reason: Subscription fatigue — I've cancelled enough of these to know my pattern.
agents.top_objection: Price is too high for marginal differentiation.

agents.profile: Cares how it looks on the shelf / counter.
agents.reason: Differentiation is too thin against incumbent Olipop Prebiotic Soda-style brands.
agents.top_objection: Crowded category — too many lookalikes already.

agents.profile: Buys small to test, large if it works.
agents.reason: Retail dominance of Liquid Death Mountain Water makes a DTC-first launch hard for me to bother with.
agents.top_objection: No retail presence yet — DTC-only is friction.

agent_panel.consensus: Forecast of 16.5% trial is grounded in comparable-brand evidence. Panel recommends 'test before launch'. Treat agent reasoning as explanation, not validation.
agent_panel.coverage_warning: Comparable coverage is weak for this product subtype, so this buyer-panel discussion is directional — it explains the forecast's logic, not validated buyer behavior.
risk_factors: Differentiation may not survive shelf comparison

rounds.summary: Panel reacted to the 16.5% comparable-anchored trial estimate. Stance split: 5 for / 7 neutral / 8 against. Initial enthusiasm tempered by typical DTC friction.
rounds.title: First Reaction

rounds.summary: Panel weighed the product against 5 anchored comparables. Discussion centered on whether differentiation justifies switching cost from incumbents.
rounds.title: Comparable Comparison

rounds.summary: Panel converged: trial rate of 16.5% is consistent with comparable-brand adoption patterns. Verdict aligns with 'test before launch'.
rounds.title: Consensus

agent_panel.winning_message: Position against the strongest anchor (Athletic Brewing NA Beer) by leading with category-specific differentiation.
